name: Redstone Random Number Generator
description: Build a redstone randomizer using observer-based randomness. Use multiple observers watching torches or other unstable components to generate unpredictable output. The circuit should output one of 4 possible signals (selectable via lamps or colored wool).
hints: Observers watching torches can detect random flickering
Use multiple observers in parallel for different outputs
Torch randomness comes from game tick variations
Can use water flow or sand falling for additional entropy
Output can be amplified with comparators

verification.initial_state: All output lamps should be off
verification.action: Activate the randomizer with a lever
verification.expected_result: One of the 4 output lamps should light up randomly
verification.test: Trigger multiple times and verify different outputs occur
